name: pi-packs
description: Umbrella Pi package: /install picker for a curated set of pi extensions (pi-qq, pi-chrome, pi-intercom, pi-linter, pi-bar, pi-prompt-shelf, pi-caveman, pi-graphite, pi-gh-cli, pi-loadout, pi-cp).

installable.name: pi-qq
installable.description: Ask side questions in an overlay.

installable.name: pi-bar
installable.description: Show model, thinking, and context in the footer.

installable.name: pi-caveman
installable.description: Make replies terse to save tokens.

installable.name: pi-gh-cli
installable.description: Drive the GitHub CLI from Pi.

installable.name: pi-cp
installable.description: Slack-ready rich clipboard commands for pi assistant responses.
